review_title: Definitely recommend.
description: Really good.
author: Ori C.
pros: Strong features, especially for an early stage product. Superb customer service that really helped with the design, implementation, and onboarding.
cons: Some features can be further developed at future iterations of the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Pointerpro - surveys and a great deal more
description: Tremendous. Support team is responsive and they continue to evolve the product
author: Tony F.
pros: Ease of use and ability to create multiple assessments for a variety of uses.
cons: Upgrade to ability to aggregate reports was a bit expensive

review_title: Incompetence of Pointerpro
description: Frustration, anger, disappointment, etc.
author: Gary O.
pros: Nothing. There was literally nothing that was positive except their promises.
cons: Programming competence Customer service Quality of product Cooperative attitude What went wrong?? It would be much easier to say what went right because the list would be virtually nil while the list of what went wrong would be a dissertation. Thanks to Pointerpro and their incompetence in both software programming and customer service, our company took a significant hit reputation-wise and subsequently financially. Over the last 3 years, Pointerpro consistently produced software that did not function as it was supposed to and promised and consistently denied responsibility or accountability. Our firm is a small one or we would have taken them to court and sued them for their incompetence and damages. It is beyond my comprehension how others who have rated them could have had a positive experience unless their programming was so simple and straightforward that a second year college student could have done it. We have customers who have dropped us and their comments were basically this: "As long as you are working with Pointerpro, we will not do business with you despite the quality of your products". Our product is something that is done online and requires functional programming. I would strongly encourage anyone who has anything beyond a simple software solution to go elsewhere.

review_title: Great Features & Support
description: Overall, we've been extremely satisfied with the experience provided by Pointerpro and have been a customer for many years.
author: Jamie G.
pros: Pointerpro offers exceptional feature functionality, making it a valuable tool for our survey needs. We particularly appreciate the ability to add custom fields and formulas, allowing us to generate tailored reports from survey responses. The platform’s branding capabilities enable us to create surveys that align seamlessly with our visual identity. Additionally, its integration options with other tools enhance overall efficiency. Beyond its powerful features, Pointerpro provides excellent customer support whenever needed, ensuring a smooth user experience. We highly recommend it for anyone looking for a versatile and user-friendly survey solution.
cons: The rich feature functionality means there is a lot to learn when using the tool.

review_title: “Yes, we can do that.”
description: Pointer Pro has been foundational to the launch of our business, and we look forward to collaborating on the growth of our business and supporting new innovations.
author: Scott L.
pros: We have been thoroughly impressed with pointer pros platform and nimble features. We reviewed several other well-known platforms and none could deliver both with robust, calculating abilities and options for creating aesthetic reports. It was the aesthetic options that very much separated pointer pro from the rest. In addition, we were very impressed with pointer pros on boarding process and support of our ideas, helping create a pathway for our success which was crucial.
cons: Some customer service representatives in the chat lines are either ignorant or lazy. At times, we have been told answers that have been incorrect. This does not apply to [sensitive content hidden] who have been really helpful.

review_title: First Class Team & Service
description: The team at Pointer Pro is nothing less than first-class! They're always there when we need support, and the platform is very user-friendly and professional. They're always looking to improve and help us succeed. That's more than. enough for us. Thanks, Pointer Pro!
author: Paul M.
cons: Initially, the customization options for PDF reports were limited and clunky. They've made improvements, and we're pleased with the upgrades. From a design and graphics standpoint, it would be nice to see further improvements, but for the most part we're pleased.

review_title: Comprehensive Functionality
description: I came across Survey Anyplace from Google when I was looking for a very interactive survey design logic that chooses random questions from a pool. I have been using it since.
author: Ali A.
pros: 1. Very easy to learn the interface. 2. Random select questions from a pool, for complex survey design. 3. Custom questions using coding. For example you can include tables. 4. Fast servers. 5. Very mobile-friendly. 6. Survey Result is very clear, with charts and figures.
cons: 1. No pre-defined CS design. 2. Costly for some firms.

review_title: Great powerful tool
author: Margot F.
pros: Its powerful software that allowed me build the exact project i had in mind, which i could not find anywhere else
cons: It was quite technical and the learning curve a bit steep but the onboarding team was incredibly helpful.

review_title: Pointerpo has been a very useful tool for our work with clients
description: Pointerpro has provided the product we need with excellent and responsive customer service. The team has always been quick to respond with replies to email queries or requests for a meeting.
author: Lisa M.
pros: Pointerpro allows for the creation of highly personalized surveys and the delivery of customized results reports to participants. The ability to tailor cover pages and adjust the overall look ensures that the final product aligns with our branding. It's the best tool I've so far found for combining both functionality and flexibility in survey reporting.
cons: Some of the bulleting and numbering formatting features for text in the reports can feel clunky and limiting. Additionally, there is a bit of a learning curve when it comes to programming the system for more complex results calculations. It takes some time to fully understand how to set up these advanced features efficiently.

review_title: Great Platform - One of the Few that Offers High Quality and Customizable Reports
description: Very positive. Anytime we have had any hiccups or needed any help, support is responsive and helpful. They also offer unique or custom solutions if you need something different.
author: Evan L.
pros: It's one of the very few platforms that allows for instant creation of custom PDF reports based on the survey. PointerPro also frequently updates their platform with new features so it's always fresh.
cons: The cost. It gets to be a bit more expensive with multiple users and becomes a considerable investment.

review_title: A robust and reliable solution we can highly recommend.
author: Pieter D.
pros: Pointerpro has become an essential tool for us. We use it both in marketing—offering a free basic assessment with instant reports—and in consulting, where we map innovation culture within organizations. The platform is very flexible, with powerful options to design questionnaires and create custom formulas.
cons: Because of the many possibilities, it can sometimes feel a bit complex at first. But once you get the hang of it, the flexibility is exactly what makes the tool so valuable. Luckily, their tech support is fast and very helpful whenever we need a hand.

review_title: Pointerpro - ons-stop-shop
description: It's been great so far - we're looking forward rolling out our first assessment and the following 37! Thanks!
author: Uri L.
pros: The fact it's a 360 solution for assessments, providing a streamlined process from creating the assessment to generating the backend reports. The support form your team is also worth mentioning - [sensitive content hidden] and [sensitive content hidden] (with whom we've interacted so far) deliver on your service promises!
cons: It's not that I don't like it, but I do think the formula section can be made even more intuitive with a visualization interface to further "dumb it down". Think "how would I allow a 10 years old to use formulas correctly", and I believe you'll save tons of time and resources for your customers and [sensitive content hidden]:D
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool
description: Positive. It took a little to learn the program at first.
author: Brandon J.
pros: Pointer pro is quite easy and intuitive as a tool. Pointer pro has been quite positive for our company usage.
cons: It's a little expensive especially if you're not using it to generate income.

review_title: My go to platform to build my own Surveys.
description: Attractive and easy to use. Impress your audience with a very professional looking survey and have optimal control building it. Full set of metrics available in the report section. Well recommended.
author: Peter B.
pros: It's super intuitive, and has so many types of questions you can build your Surveys with, it's just amazingly complete. On top of that, you can build your own look 'n feel and sharing it with a QR code is a breeze.
cons: Bit pricey. A tier below of the one I had where you can work with 500 responses would be fine for me too.

review_title: You absolutely can't go wrong with these guys!!!!
description: A brilliant business is built on its people and somehow Pointerpro have managed to assemble best in class and all under one roof. They are always available, they solve everything you put in front of them and the software isn't half bad either!!!I cannot tell you how Pointerpro and their platform delivered and ticked EVERY box.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Our previous PHP platform was end of life and we were facing serious challenges with an updated more modern solution, that was until we found Pointerpro.The whole experience has been absolutely seamless, with the support of their absolutely amazing team we have been able to accomplish everything. We simply handed over the reins and they turned our old product in to a new, fresh, manageable and easily deploy-able suite of assessments.
cons: We have found no cons whatsoever - Pointerpro continue to deliver in every possible way.

review_title: Building an Assessment tool using PointerPro
description: Very positive, excellent support both technically and from our account manager
author: Steve H.
pros: Powerful tool that enabled me to translate my knowledge and experience into an Assessment Tool that can be leveraged by others. Comprehensive functionality means that I managed to achieve more than I imagine was possible using this kind of tool.
cons: Would like a more simple user interface and the 'help' section could be better.

review_title: Great for automating survey responses in a PDF to download or email
description: It's great but just needs an upgrade I think.
author: Darren W.
pros: The main reason we used this software was to automate survey responses in a PDF for the user to download or email. There are not many solutions on the market that can do this all in one.
cons: I think the help pages need updating, they're not very clear when you are new to Survey Anyplace as they describe how to do things but do not show you step-by-step. Not being able to customise the front cover image of a PDF template is a bit annoying and unless you're a CSS wizard, the PDF responses can look very plain.

review_title: Survey Says...Survey Anyplace is My New Go-To!
description: I found Survey Anyplace user-friendly, creative and even funny, easy to share and wildly helpful processing my received data. 10+ for Survey Anyplace!
author: Tom C.
pros: So I've used a number of survey programs to extract opinions and information from friends and organizations to which I belong. Truth be told I've never had a problem with any of them. None of them, however, have ever made me actually do a happy dance like Survey Anyplace has done. (Twice. I've done a happy dance twice. #literally) The thing I love most about happy dance isn't the interface that one creates to build a survey. Though, trust me. It's ideal and easy. I'm pretty good with computers but I'm not one of you super-smart Millennials that knows everything about everything and then some. I know enough. I count on ease of use to manifest with every program or app I try. Ease of use with Survey Anyplace goes to 11! As an entrepreneur, one who is starting my own company, it's the feedback and what I'm able to do with it from a reporting standpoint that makes Survey Anyplace the hands-down winner in my book. There are more date filters than one would ever need...and I needed a bunch. You can send PDF's off Survey Anyplace. I was able to show my investor that my path was exactly where we wanted to be. I was even able to loop her into the integration of information by looping her in through a variety of apps she used on a daily basis. You won't get better reporting anywhere else. Period. Whether it's collaboration or ingenuity you're looking for. Survey Anyplace is your best bet. Take it from me.
cons: I had trouble adding a few pictures I needed feedback on at first. Then I took the time to ask. Worked like a charm once I knew what i was doing. No complaints at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very good usability and functionality
author: Julian T.
pros: What I like most is the report function. In particular, the relaunch of this function is very intuitive to use. In addition, an extremely large amount is possible, especially through the use of variables. The great depth of functionality combined with the simplicity of the application convince me a lot.In addition, the support is quick to respond and has always been able to help me very well. In connection with this, the "library" of tips and tricks is also really helpful. If you search a bit here, you will find good guides on all topics that instruct you on how to do what.
cons: What bothers me is that the website often hangs or takes a long time to load, which is most likely not due to my PC or internet connection.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Valuable assessment tool
description: I highly recommend Pointerpro to anyone who is looking for a way to assess employee skills and knowledge.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pointerpro's assessment feature is incredibly versatile. I've used it to assess employee skills, customer satisfaction, and even my own personal development. Additonally, Pointerpro's customer support is excellent.
cons: I wish there were more templates available for the assessment feature.

review_title: A very nice product with upside potential
description: The customer support team has been very responsive and helpful. The time zone difference between Europe and the US often means that replies don't come back until the next businss day which is a bit of a pain when you're on deadline and need a quick answer. I hope that there would be support in the US time zone going back to the West Coast (Pacific Time of 8am - 6pm)
author: David O.
pros: Developing a scored survey was fairly easy to do. The formulas and question logic makes it very flexible to develop what is needed. I also like the dynamic if-then functions in ReportR to dynamically generate text content based on formula results.
cons: I wished that ReportR had more chart options to visualize data. I also wish there were easy APIs to integrate external data sources into the report generated by ReportR.

review_title: A Key Strategic Business Partner
description: Survey Anyplace has allowed us to grow our consulting business in ways we never thought possible. The initial reason we purchased the software is only a fraction of how we use it now. In this virtual world, we are able to reach more customers and create a seamless process to collect information.
author: Mallory C.
pros: This product is easy to use and provides a customized solution to fit our specific business needs. Our users have never had any issues with completing the surveys and the amount of data and information we are able to collect and use is invaluable to our orgainzation.
cons: In using this product for over a year, we honestly have not come across situations where something has been missing or where we have been disappointed with the product.

review_title: Extremely fun and interesting surveys that we love using for our mobile users.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Survey Anyplace truly states their purpose. Their surveys are so easy to access & respond to from anywhere. We've seem massive success so far & plan to expand our mobile survey initiative.
cons: At first we were worried that Survey Anyplace might not be right for us but we've quickly learned our users love using them & we've seen an increase in participation. Additionally, their customer service is phenomenal & it's very clear they're always looking for ways to make the experience better.

review_title: Beautiful product, very expensive, poor self-service instructions means you have to pay more.
description: Do not recommend Survey Anyplace - the product marketing is beautiful but misleading, prices are twice that of the nearest competitor, instructions assume a high level of expertise and there is no use of videos to support learning, and service is slow and lacks detail (unless you pay for it). Response to my feedback so far? Pay more. Very disappointed.
author: Rebecca H.
pros: Beautiful end result - but I have not managed to achieve it yet.
cons: I've spent over $3000 and not managed to get a single survey out. It does not do 360 as advertised, not without spending $2000 more. Setting up questions is relatively easy but everything else - including simply collecting responses - is fairly complex. Producing a full report is VERY complex. Overnight response rate is very frustrating when you are trying to get the product up and running. I've complained about this, and was told my only option is to spend more money.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A sophisticated solution to complex client interactions
description: Support and communication is excellent. Very helpful and set us up for success using the platform.
author: Harvey J.
pros: Reportr is the feature that met our need to provide potential clients with immediate reward for their information. The UX for the potential client is excellent and very professional. It makes us look like a professional business 10 time larger than we are.
cons: It's a steep learning curve to build the forms and reports. This complexity was challenging the first time we built out a survey/report but gets easier with practice.
